initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    store.s_store_type,
    date_dim.d_year,
    SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales,
    SUM(store_returns.sr_return_amt) AS total_returns
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN store ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN store_returns ON store_sales.ss_store_sk = store_returns.sr_store_sk
    JOIN date_dim AS return_date ON store_returns.sr_returned_date_sk = return_date.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_month_seq = 1200
    AND return_date.d_month_seq = 1200
GROUP BY 
    store.s_store_type,
    date_dim.d_year
ORDER BY 
    store.s_store_type,
    date_dim.d_year
LIMIT 100
